title: Nutty Canadian Nuts Pate
description: A fluffy vegan-friendly hangover-cure dish featuring nuttiness and a touch of yellow food coloring to enhance the flavor and appearance.

ingredients.name: Almonds
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 2 hours

ingredients.name: Flaxseeds
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 2 hours

instructions: Soak almonds, walnuts, and cashews in water for at least 2 hours.
Add soaked nuts, sunflower seeds, salt, flaxseeds, and water to a food processor bowl.
Blend all ingredients until the mixture is smooth and creamy. You can add a pinch of yellow food coloring if desired for extra visual appeal.
Transfer the pate into a serving dish.
Spray the top with vegetable oil spray to prevent sticking. Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Serve warm as a snack or accompaniment to meals.
